basic_details.job_title: HCSL Store Keeper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard Limited has released the official Store Keeper Notification 2026 on 20-05-2026 at cochinshipyard.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the HCSL Store Keeper Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a qualification of Graduate with Post Graduate Diploma in Materials Management or Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical / Electrical) can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 09-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation: PwBD: up to 45 years; Ex-servicemen: as per GoI guidelines (max 45 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with Post Graduate Diploma in Materials Management, Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical / Electrical)
qualification.details: Graduate with Post Graduate Diploma in Materials Management Or Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical / Electrical)

selection_process: Objective Type Offline Test Descriptive Type Offline Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HCSL Store Keeper recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the HCSL Store Keeper post is 09 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Store Keeper post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate with a Post Graduate Diploma in Materials Management or a Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical / Electrical) to be eligible for the Store Keeper position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Store Keeper post is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for certain categories as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 400/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Store Keeper position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Store Keeper post will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 23,500 to Rs. 77,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the selection stages for HCSL Store Keeper recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Objective Type Offline Test, a Descriptive Type Offline Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. When does the online application process begin?
faq.answer: The online application process for the HCSL Store Keeper recruitment begins on 20 May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for ex-servicemen?
faq.answer: Yes, ex-servicemen are eligible for age relaxation as per Government of India guidelines, with a maximum age limit of 45 years.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly.
